7 Minutes from Al Nahda

Amer Center Near Al Nahda

مركز آمر بالقرب من النهضة

Al Nahda residents from both Dubai and Sharjah sides - we're your closest official Amer Center! Located just 7 minutes away inside Dubai Immigration Building, DAFZA Al Twar. Skip the Sharjah traffic and get your visa services done quickly.

FREE PARKING

1 hour free shaded parking

FAST LANE

Same-day processing available

Address

Inside Dubai Immigration Building, DAFZA - Al Twar, Dubai, UAE

Just past the Dubai-Sharjah border

Working Hours

Sunday - Thursday: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM

Saturday: 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM

Contact

+971 50 451 2311

Services for Nahda Residents

  • Golden Visa Processing
  • Family Visa Sponsorship
  • Emirates ID Services
  • Visa Renewal & Cancellation
  • Attestation - All Embassies
  • Translation - All Languages
  • DHA Medical Fitness
  • Typing Services
  • Dubai Municipality & DEQ
  • Tasheel Services
  • Business Setup & Licensing
  • MOHRE & PRO Services

Perfect for Al Nahda & Border Area Residents

Avoid Sharjah Queues

Why wait in long lines? Our location inside Dubai Immigration means faster processing and less waiting.

Easy Border Access

Just 5 minutes past the Dubai-Sharjah border. Convenient for both Dubai and Sharjah residents.

Extended Hours

Open until 8 PM on weekdays - visit after work without taking time off.
